$comment: Source of truth for hand-annotated drift the surface_index.json emitter merges into the generated baseline. Each entry MUST reference a Powerloom tracker thread. The emitter (scripts/build_surface_index.py) reads this file at generation time. The drift test (tests/test_surface_index_drift.py) asserts (a) every gap here corresponds to a real entity, (b) every entry has a thread reference, (c) the generated surface_index.json contains exactly these gaps + no others.
